title: Piano Basics: From Zero to First Song
description: A beginner's journey to learning the piano, focusing on basic theory, hand coordination, and playing your first simple song.
advice: Practice 15-20 minutes every single day rather than 2 hours once a week. Muscle memory builds through consistent daily repetition.

subGoals.title: Learn the Notes & Basic Posture
subGoals.description: Identify all 88 keys, sit correctly, and shape relaxed hands.

subGoals.title: Master Major Scales (C, G, D)
subGoals.description: Play three major scales hands-separate at 60 BPM.

subGoals.title: Play First Simple Song Hands Together
subGoals.description: Perform a beginner piece (e.g. Ode to Joy) hands together.

tasks.title: Weekly Finger Exercises (Hanon)
tasks.description: Short Hanon-style warmups to build evenness and independence.

tasks.title: Practice Scales
tasks.description: Cycle through C, G, and D major scales with a metronome.

tasks.title: Song Practice
tasks.description: Layer hands separately then together, slowly.
tasks.notes: Record yourself once a week to track progress.
